violations.text: Tomato & Basil soup was observed held at 128 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Soup was properly reheated for hot holding at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving in the front service area were observed to have an accumulation of residue and debris. Non-food contact surfaces are to be cleaned at a frequency necessary to preclude the buildup of soil and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2026
The ceiling over the kitchen area was observed to have a buildup of dust. Physical facilities are to be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2026

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. The tubing was adjusted for proper sanitizer dispensing in the dishwasher and was retested at the proper level of 50-100 ppm at the time of inspection. - The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was less than 100 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 150-400 ppm. Sanitizer was manually added for proper sanitizing and retested at 150-400 ppm at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following were observed to have an accumulation of dust and debris... - walk-in cooler unit fan shroud - back prep area light shield Non-food contact surfaces are to be cleaned as often as necessary to preclude the build-up of dust and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/05/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm) at the time of inspection. Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. (Sanitizer bottle was empty and switched with new bottle at the time of inspection.) Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (deli slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. (PIC properly cleaned and sanitized the deli slicer at the time of inspection.) Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2024

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dish machine. PIC to obtain testing devices (test strips) to monitor the chlorine sanitizing solution of the counter area dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024
